description: Request payload sent on the match:search-request bus channel to find candidate matches.

correlationId.description: Client-generated correlation ID to thread the response back to the originating request

referenceId.description: Annotation ID of the reference to search candidates for

context.description: Gathered context for the reference annotation

limit.description: Maximum number of candidate results to return

useSemanticScoring.description: Enable semantic similarity scoring in addition to keyword matching
